title: Rick And Morty Items Mod
description: A mod that adds items from Rick And Morty into Minecraft.
body:
Hello, this mod adds things from Rick And Morty into Minecraft, for example, some gadgets/weapons from the series, have fun playing this mod!
This mod adds items from the series into the game, so if you're a rick and morty lover, the. get the mod! :D 
this mod also has the features of the items from the Rick And Morty Series, with this mod, you can enhance your Rick Sanchez experience alot!
What the mod adds: Items from rick and morty to make your experiecne with rick a reality in minecraft
